name: Gator
bio: As MH Construction's Chief Moral Officer, Gator keeps the team grounded in consistency, energy, and daily connection. His presence boosts morale across office and field routines, reflecting the same dependable, all-weather mindset MH brings to client partnerships and mission execution.
careerHighlights: Delivers daily morale checks across office and field routines.
Provides consistent team energy during high-pressure project weeks.
Represents MH reliability through all-weather training and readiness.
Supports relationship-first culture with positive, steady presence.
funFact: Gator reports for morale duty early and treats every team huddle like a mission briefing.
specialInterests: All-Weather Morale Support and Field Readiness
